stories.title: Masters Preview — 3 Days Out, Scheffler Favored, McIlroy Defends

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
The Masters is 3 DAYS AWAY. 🌿

91 players. $21M purse. 90th edition.
Amazon Prime debuts. Tiger's absent again.

Scheffler +500. McIlroy +1000. DeChambeau +1000.

The biggest week in golf starts Thursday at Augusta.

#GolfFanrecap #TheMasters #Golf

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Masters odds right now:

Scheffler: +500 🥇
DeChambeau: +1000 (trending UP)
Rahm: +1000
McIlroy: +1000 (trending DOWN)
Schauffele: +1400
Åberg: +1400

3 days. Augusta National. Let's go.

#GolfFanrecap #TheMasters

stories.title: J.J. Spaun Wins Valero Texas Open — Earns Final Masters Spot

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
J.J. Spaun wins the Valero Texas Open by 1 stroke. 🏆

His 2nd Valero title. His ticket to Augusta.

T2: Wallace, Kim, MacIntyre.
Rickie Fowler missed the cut — no Masters for him.

See you Thursday, J.J.

#GolfFanrecap #ValeroTexasOpen #TheMasters

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
The 2026 Masters field is SET.

Last spot: J.J. Spaun (Valero Texas Open champion).

Fowler missed the cut. Spaun's in. Augusta calls.

$1,764,000 winner's check. Not bad either.

#GolfFanrecap #TheMasters #Golf

stories.title: McIlroy's Title Defense — Back Injury, Fading Odds, Unfinished Business

x_posts.label: Post 3-1
x_posts.text:
Rory McIlroy won the 2025 Masters to complete his career Grand Slam.

Now he defends with:
— A back injury
— 3 weeks off (career-longest layoff)
— Odds slipping to +1000

"I can enjoy every minute." - Rory

Can he? Augusta starts Thursday.

#GolfFanrecap #McIlroy #TheMasters

x_posts.label: Post 3-2
x_posts.text:
2025: McIlroy birdies 18, wins the playoff, completes the Grand Slam.

2026: Back injury. Three weeks off. Odds trending down.

The greatest storyline in Masters history gets a sequel.

#GolfFanrecap #TheMasters #Rory

article.headline: McIlroy's Masters Defense: Grand Slam Complete, Back Injured, Odds Slipping

stories.title: DeChambeau's LIV Form — Back-to-Back Wins, Masters Odds Climbing

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Bryson DeChambeau heads to Augusta red hot.

Back-to-back LIV wins (Singapore + South Africa).
Masters odds: +1000 and CLIMBING.

He's been inside the top 10 every round of the last 2 Masters.

LIV form. Augusta pedigree. Watch out.

#GolfFanrecap #DeChambeau #TheMasters

stories.title: Lauren Coughlin Wins LPGA Aramco by 5 — Wire-to-Wire at Shadow Creek

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Lauren Coughlin. Wire-to-wire. 5 shots. 🏆

3rd LPGA title. First win in the United States.
$600,000 winner's check at Shadow Creek.

T2: Nelly Korda and Leona Maguire.

Korda's runner-up drought in 2026 continues. Coughlin delivers.

#GolfFanrecap #LPGATour #AramcoChampionship

stories.title: Tiger Woods Won't Play Augusta — Second Straight Year Without the Legend

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
Tiger Woods will NOT play the 2026 Masters.

Second straight year without him at Augusta.

Car crash March 27. DUI charges. Stepped away for treatment.

A Masters legend urging him to retire.

Augusta won't be the same. 🐅

#GolfFanrecap #TigerWoods #TheMasters

x_posts.text:
Masters 2026 — by the numbers:

🌿 90th edition
📅 April 9-12
💰 $21 million purse
🎥 Amazon Prime debut
👥 91 players
⛳ 17th hole shortened 12 yards

Three days. Augusta. The greatest tournament in golf.
